name: 09 · Agent + Tool Loop
description: Step 9 of the learning path — the Agent node. A multi-turn LLM (Ollama qwen3.5:9b, the `up-ollama` default) reads a customer message, decides whether to call the `lookup_order` tool, then composes a final reply. The tool is a SubWorkflow (the 08a-order-lookup child): its Start declares `order_id`, which the agent compiler turns into the LLM-facing tool schema, and the child's Python returns the shipping status — so this demo doubles as the canonical 'tool with an explicit Start/End contract' example. Requires 08a-order-lookup to be seeded first (alphabetical order guarantees this). Exercises the agent's full loop topology (parked state, dispatch/collect per tool, route guards), the Ollama adapter's native tool-call path (`message.tool_calls` in `/api/chat`, since Ollama 0.3+), AND sub-workflow spawn from inside a tool dispatch. Requires `just dev::up-ollama` with a tool-capable model — any qwen2.5+/qwen3+ or llama3.1+. Change `data.model.model` here if you've overridden `OLLAMA_MODEL`.
